zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley於1252年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Astley37歲，母親Joan de Bois29歲。他於1276年與Mrs. Sybil Astley在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1295年被列為1st lord astley。他去世於1301年1月18日在英國享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley于1252年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Astley37岁，母亲Joan de Bois29岁。他于1276年与Mrs. Sybil Astley在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1295年被列为1st lord astley。他去世于1301年1月18日在英国享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley was born in 1252, in Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Astley, was 37 and his mother, Joan de Bois, was 29. He married Mrs. Sybil Astley in 1276, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1295, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as 1st lord astley. He died on 18 January 1301, in England, at the age of 49, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley est né en 1252, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Astley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bois, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Sybil Astley en 1276, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1295, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 1st lord astley. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1301, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley 1252 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Astley 37 und seine Mutter Joan de Bois 29. Er hat 1276 in Warwickshire, England Mrs. Sybil Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1295, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 1st lord astley aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Januar 1301 im Alter von 49 Jahren in England und wurde in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Mrs. Sybil Astley nel 1276, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1295, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 1st lord astley. ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astleyが1252年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Astleyは37歳，母Joan de Boisは29歳であった。1276年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMrs. Sybil Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1295年，43歳の時，職業は1st lord astleyと記録されている。彼は1301年1月18日にイギリスで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Astley: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley(이)가 1252년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Astley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Bois(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 워윅실르에서 Mrs. Sybil Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1295년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 1st lord astley이었다. 그는 1301년 1월 18일 영국에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley nasceu em 1252, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Astley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Bois, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Sybil Astley em 1276, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1295, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como 1st lord astley. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1301, em Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Astley: ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Astley 1st Lord Astley родился в 1252 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Astley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bois, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Sybil Astley в 1276 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1295 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии 1st lord astley. Он умер 18 января 1301 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Mrs. Sybil Astley en 1276, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1295, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era 1st lord astley. Murió el 18 de enero de 1301, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
